use_cases: Toggle boolean settings or feature enablement in configuration panels
Select multiple items in filtering or categorization interfaces
Capture binary consent or agreement in forms
Mark items as complete in task or checklist interfaces
ai_summary: A lightweight checkbox component from Subframe library featuring proper accessibility with focus-visible outlines and keyboard navigation support. Includes hover and active states with dark mode compatibility. Designed as a reusable selection control for binary choice interfaces in web applications.
